author: doll-agent
content:
Done. ferray_core::Array<T, D> already supported serde via array/serde_impl, but StringArray<D> didn't - strings couldn't be persisted alongside numeric arrays.

Added Serialize and Deserialize impls in src/serde_impl.rs mirroring ferray-core's pattern: { 'shape': [...], 'data': [...] } row-major. Deserialize validates rank against D::NDIM and rebuilds via D::from_dim_slice.

Added serde as regular dependency (matching ferray-core's unconditional exposure) and serde_json as dev-dep.

6 tests covering 1D/2D/IxDyn round-trips, unicode preservation, rank/size mismatch errors. ferray-strings: 140 -> 146 lib tests, clippy clean. Commit 4532cba8.
